item.title: How to Install Lighttpd with PHP, MariaDB and PhpMyAdmin in Ubuntu
item.description: Lighttpd is an open-source web server for Linux machines, very fast and very small in size, it doesn’t require a lot of memory and CPU usage which makes it one of the best servers for any project that needs speed in deploying web pages. Lighttpd Features # Support for FastCGI, SCGI, CGI interfaces. Support for using chroot. Support for mod_rewrite. Support for TLS/SSL using OpenSSL. A Very small size: 1MB.
